tags.description: List of tag categories the snippet belongs to.

scope.description: Context in which the snippet is executable.

condition_id.description: Identifier of condition linked to this snippet.

priority.description: Relative priority in which the snippet is executed.

network.description: Whether the snippet is network-wide instead of site-wide.

shared_network.description: If a network snippet, whether can be activated on discrete sites instead of network-wide.

modified.description: Date and time when the snippet was last modified, in ISO format.

code_error.description: Error message if the snippet code could not be parsed.
